steps.t: Theodore Gorse and Haley Meadowsweet have attracted Bingo's attention in the Forsaken Inn, and he wants to learn more about them.
Bingo is in the Forsaken Inn, in the Lone-lands.
Theodore Gorse is in the Forsaken Inn. Bingo wants to know if Theodore Gorse, self-proclaimed Master Treasure Seeker, will teach him the profession.
Theodore gave you a parchment with a riddle on it, apparently a clue to the location of a treasure in the Lone-lands. The parchment reads: 'The torren…
Theodore Gorse is in the Forsaken Inn. You found the treasure that Theodore Gorse could not, but it was only a parchment of paper with a cryptic messa…
Bingo Boffin is in the Forsaken Inn.
